title: Navigation
description: Site navigation data structure — drives both classic and offcanvas navbar variants.

i18nKey.description: Hugo i18n key for the brand label.

url.description: Root-relative URL for the brand link.

items.description: Top-level navigation items. Language switcher is always auto-generated and not included here.

i18nKey.description: Hugo i18n key for the link label.

activePrefix.description: If the current page's RelPermalink starts with this value, the link is marked active.

i18nKey.description: Hugo i18n key for the dropdown toggle label.

id.description: HTML id for the toggle button (used by aria-labelledby).

alignEnd.description: When true, applies dropdown-menu-end to right-align the menu.

activePrefixes.description: The dropdown toggle is marked active when any of these strings is a prefix of the current page's RelPermalink.

dropdownLink.title: DropdownLink
dropdownLink.description: A link inside a dropdown menu.

i18nKey.description: Hugo i18n key for the link label.

dropdownDivider.title: DropdownDivider
dropdownDivider.description: A horizontal rule divider inside a dropdown menu.
